section.title: Step 2: Write service function
section.p: Action: Author service: takes AsyncSession + In schema, returns Out schema.

section.title: Step 3: Wire route
section.p: Action: Add APIRouter route that validates, calls service, returns Out.

section.title: Step 4: Register dependencies
section.p: Action: Add Depends(get_session) and any auth/permission deps.

section.title: Step 5: Snapshot openapi
section.p: Action: Generate openapi.json; commit to repo; add CI diff job.
